docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2023 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALVAREZ, MARIA

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00); REMARKS: RODOLFO KUAN IS IN HIS LATE 80S AND CANNOT CARE FOR HIMSELF. JEFFREY KUAN IS RODOLFO'S SON AND PRIMARY CARETAKER. JEFFREY KUAN ACCEPTED THE LEGAL DOCUMENTS. SERVED JUL-20-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KUAN, RODOLFO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALVAREZ, MARIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUAN, RODOLFO $394.63 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $464.63 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JEFFRIE KUAN, SON FILED BY DEFENDANT KUAN, RODOLFO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-23-2023 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO OCT-03-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARIA ALVAREZ IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS DAISEY CAMEY. JEFFRIE LUAN IS PRESENT AS THE SON/PRIMARY CARETAKER OF DEFENDANT RODOLFO KUAN. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS THE ASSISTANCE OF A SPANISH-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU/S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $394.63 FILED BY ALVAREZ, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT KUAN, RODOLFO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-23-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CONTINUED FOR SPANISH-LANGUAGE INTERPRETER (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

PLAINTIFF MARIA ALVAREZ IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS DEISY CAMEY AND IS ASSISTED BY SPANISH-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO (#300802). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARGARET WU; CLERK: S.
